list.name: patient_id
list.query: SELECT id AS value, (id || ' - ' || nom) AS text FROM patients ORDER BY id;

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  a.ts AS "time",
  p.nom AS "patient",
  a.type AS "type",
  a.severity AS "niveau",
  a.message AS "message"
FROM alertes a
JOIN patients p ON p.id = a.patient_id
WHERE ($patient_id = -1 OR p.id = $patient_id)
  AND $__timeFilter(a.ts)
ORDER BY a.ts DESC
LIMIT 200;

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM t.ts) * 1000 AS "time",
  t.hr AS "value",
  p.nom AS "metric"
FROM telemetrie t
JOIN patients p ON p.id = t.patient_id
WHERE ($patient_id = -1 OR p.id = $patient_id)
  AND $__timeFilter(t.ts)
ORDER BY t.ts ASC;

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM t.ts) * 1000 AS "time",
  t.temp AS "value",
  p.nom AS "metric"
FROM telemetrie t
JOIN patients p ON p.id = t.patient_id
WHERE ($patient_id = -1 OR p.id = $patient_id)
  AND $__timeFilter(t.ts)
ORDER BY t.ts ASC;

SELECT 
  id AS "ID patient",
  nom AS "Nom",
  prenom AS "Prénom",
  dob AS "Date de naissance",
  statut AS "Statut",
  created_at AS "Date de création"
FROM patients
WHERE statut = 'cli'
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
